title: Queens That Can Attack the King

testcases.input: queens = [[0,1],[1,0],[4,0],[0,4],[3,3],[2,4]], king = [0,0] Output: [[0,1],[1,0],[3,3]] Explanation: The diagram above shows the three queens that can directly attack the king and the three queens that cannot attack the king (i.e., marked with red dashes).
testcases.expectedOutput: [[0,1],[1,0],[3,3]] Explanation: The diagram above shows the three queens that can directly attack the king and the three queens that cannot attack the king (i.e., marked with red dashes).

testcases.input: queens = [[0,0],[1,1],[2,2],[3,4],[3,5],[4,4],[4,5]], king = [3,3] Output: [[2,2],[3,4],[4,4]] Explanation: The diagram above shows the three queens that can directly attack the king and the three queens that cannot attack the king (i.e., marked with red dashes).
testcases.expectedOutput: [[2,2],[3,4],[4,4]] Explanation: The diagram above shows the three queens that can directly attack the king and the three queens that cannot attack the king (i.e., marked with red dashes).
